raw_note_text: Synthetic operator note for testing only. Ground walked on the easy side of good after light overnight rain; far side looked to ride a touch quicker in the previous race. A couple of first-time-out types in the field, so the early market may be unsettled. This is our own short observation, not a copied article.

notes.text: Easy side of good after overnight rain; may dry through the card.
Likely an even-to-strong gallop; hold-up types may be favoured.
Far side appeared a fraction quicker earlier in the day.

notes: A few unraced/first-time-out runners in the field — early prices may move.
